category_sources: source_facts.description says stunnel is an SSL tunneling program; official stunnel homepage describes a proxy that adds TLS encryption.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stunnel and source_facts.homepage is the official stunnel site.
docs_sources: Official stunnel homepage links to https://www.stunnel.org/docs.html as Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty. Official stunnel downloads page lists source/archive code repositories, but no official source-control project URL; the visible GitHub repository says it is based on official releases and not used for active development, so it was not returned as the official repo.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SSL tunneling; official homepage describes adding TLS encryption to existing clients and servers.
